'''Oront''' was a city on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Elom (planet)/Legends|Elom]].<ref name="GoI" />

Many members of the [[Elom/Legends|Elom]] race were named after this city.<ref name="UAA">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref> [[Tor'Oront]], a mining colony on the planet [[Nyriaan/Legends|Nyriaan]], was named based on Oront after a con artist from [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] tricked a group of [[Elomin/Legends|Elomin]] to settle there and forced them to mine for [[madilon]] without notifying the planetary government.<ref name="GoI" />
